issues.description: Effect is missing the cost condition. Card text specifies 'DON!! −2' (return 2 DON!! cards from field to deck) as a cost before the effect resolves. DSL must include a condition that enforces this cost requirement.
Action should be 'AttachDon' not 'GiveDon'. The effect sets a DON!! card as active (attaches it), not adds it to hand/resources. 'GiveDon' implies adding to Don pool.
